category_sources: Official ntop nDPI product page describes it as a DPI toolkit for traffic analysis.
source_facts.description says Deep Packet Inspection library.
display_name_sources: Official ntop documentation uses the styled name nDPI.
docs_sources: Official ntop nDPI documentation site is a dedicated docs surface.
Official ntop product page links documentation and source code.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ntop/nDPI, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official ntop documentation describes protocol detection and traffic analysis use cases.
